definition.backgroundToneDeclaration: Any declaration in a themes.css rule whose selector contains background-tone or background-photo-option[data-background-tone].
definition.toneSpecificDeclaration: Declaration in an exact .background-tone-option[data-background-tone="..."] block or .background-photo-option[data-background-tone="..."]::before block.
definition.collapsible: Exact repeated property/value among tone-specific declarations that can be represented once in a grouped selector with equal specificity and original per-tone blocks retaining unique values.

nonCollapsibleSummary.reason: Most tone-specific swatch declarations are distinct per tone: --tone-swatch-start, --tone-swatch-end, and --tone-swatch-border intentionally vary by palette. Photo option declarations each point at a different image except the solar-system fallback and are not mergeable without changing preview imagery.
